system.biography:
Age: 20

Birthday: 5 Halane 700

Culture: Feudal

Social Class: Noble

Sibling Rank: 4th child of 5

Estrangement: Average

Clanhead: Father's 2nd Cousin

 

Milis Arlain is the 4th son of a vassal of the Tubaths, holders of Lyafen manor in Dobraine Hundred. He was fostered to the Tubaths at an early age after his father disappeared on a mission along Noron’s Way. His clanhead, a distant relation of his missing father, is still distraught over the father’s disappearance. Milis is armored as a Poor Knight, with an average stipend. He keeps a hunting dog named "Betsy"—the source of much annoyance in the knights’ quarters.

prototypeToken.name: Feudal Guardsman, Light - Illic of Krollater
